content.en:
It is a very hidden thing when a foreign world tribulation will occur, unless you have established a base in another foreign world and mastered the secrets of that foreign world, you can know when that foreign world will enter the great tribulation, otherwise it is difficult to speculate at all.

For example, when the Bone Clan Heaven and Earth will enter the Great Tribulation, he is not clear.

The only exotic world he knew the date of the Great Tribulation was the Holy Realm, but there were still several dark timeframes, and he didn't want to wait too long, after all, he didn't want the next Dark Forbidden Tribulation to encounter the current situation again, and the entire Dark Forbidden Domain would be ransacked.

He wants to let the human race completely control the Dark Forbidden Domain, and then sweep all the forbidden places, so that the major forces will not dare to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain again.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian thought of two ways.

The first method is to use the method of entering the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, first destroy the bases of those forces in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and then copy the body of one of the Exotic powerhouses, enter the opponent's Exotic Heaven and Earth to inquire about the news, and confirm how much time the other party has before entering the Great Tribulation again.

The second method is to directly threaten these forces and ask the other party to inform them at the time of the catastrophe, otherwise he will directly destroy the opponent's base.

But Ye Tian calculated, and the second method was estimated to be unrealistic.

After all, no one wants a force far more powerful than themselves to enter their own world, and then the entire force is likely to be invaded and destroyed.

Therefore, once he uses the second method, these forces are likely to abandon the Dark Forbidden Realm and destroy the door directly.

After all, after destroying the door, they can also re-fix the illusory door, enter other exotic worlds, and reopen a door, so that they will not be threatened by the dark forbidden realm.

After all, the current Dark Forbidden Domain is very powerful, and many small forces have taken the initiative to give up here, and there are currently more than a dozen forbidden places in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

For example, the exotic force that attacked Ye Tian at the beginning, Chaotian Pavilion, destroyed the door shortly after the fall of those supreme powers, and the forbidden place where Chaotian Pavilion was located disappeared directly.

After thinking for a while, Ye Tian thought about it: "Then use the first method!"

------------------

Not long after, Ye Tian directly confronted an exotic force that was slightly weaker than the Bone Clan, the Wind and Rain Sect.

He instantly destroyed the Wind and Rain Sect's base in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and then copied the body of one of the Wind and Rain Sect powerhouses, and entered the foreign world where the Wind and Rain Sect was located through the door.

The exotic world where the Wind and Rain Sect is located is called Huanyu Heaven and Earth, and the Wind and Rain Sect is an incomparably huge world in the Universe Heaven and Earth, and it is the most powerful force in the Universe Heaven and Earth, with six supreme powerhouses.

Ye Tian entered the Cosmos Heaven and Earth as a strong man of the Wind and Rain Sect, and immediately asked for help, and said the reason why he was still alive with a perfect reason.

That is, Ye Tian let himself go, let him come back with a message, let the Wind and Rain Sect pay a part of the resources, and inform the time when the Great Tribulation will come, so that the Wind and Rain Sect can continue to maintain the base in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

After Ye Tian said this, he thought that the Wind and Rain Sect would think about it for a while, but he didn't expect that several supreme people of the Wind and Rain Sect would discuss it.

"What should I do, the Dark Forbidden Domain gave birth to an incomparably powerful Supreme Ancestor, far beyond the ordinary third-level Supreme Ancestor, once we are informed of the arrival time of the Great Tribulation of this world, if he breaks in, none of us will be able to stop it, and when the time comes, he will destroy our Wind and Rain Sect, then everything will be over!"

"I can't tell him about the time of our Universal Heaven and Earth Tribulation, even if he makes a natal oath, he can't believe that a strong man like him won't be able to make any oath. "

"Abandon this gate, wait for the Illusory Gate of the Universe Heaven and Earth to come, we will fix the Illusory Gate and rebuild the Eternal Gate, although it will cost a lot of resources and materials, but at least the Wind and Rain Sect will not have any threat!"

"Well, then abandon this door!"

The six strongest men of the Wind and Rain Sect all agreed to abandon this gate.

Subsequently, the six strongest men came to the gate of the Wind and Rain Sect, and the six strong men joined forces to attack this gate.

The first-order gate is not very strong, the top ancestor and the ultimate powerhouse can cause damage to the door, and the strongest can destroy the door with one blow, and the six powerhouses shot together, directly knocking the door into countless cracks, which is almost unusable.

They continue to attack because what they want is to destroy the door completely, that is, to disappear completely.

Thundered!!!!

One attack after another fell, and soon this first-order gate turned into countless fragments and disappeared.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian's copy body couldn't help but secretly exclaim: "So decisive!"

I have to say, this is indeed the best way.

"I wonder if I can communicate with the body in the Dark Forbidden Realm?"

Ye Tian's copy body tried to contact it.

Once when he was in the Sacred Realm, he tried to contact but failed, and waited until the copy body stepped into the level of the strongest before contacting the body.

But now it's different, now the strength of the body is even stronger, second only to the invincible, so the connection is very deep, maybe this replica body is only comparable to the top ancestor, and it can also have a sense with the body!

Time passed slowly, and hundreds of thousands of years passed in the blink of an eye.

On this day, the replicating body has a slight connection with the body, which can transmit some simple messages from the past, but that is enough.

At this time, Ye Tian's copy body had already known the Great Tribulation Period of the Universe Heaven and Earth, and if calculated by the nine dark calendars of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Universe Heaven and Earth would only pass five dark calendars, and there would still be four dark calendars before the catastrophe would be ushered in, so there was still a lot of time.

Ye Tian not only transmitted time, but also drew the coordinates of the universe in the following days through the connection between the ontology and the replicating body.

In this way, when the Universe Heaven and Earth Tribulation is about to come in the future, he can completely build a gate and go to the Universe Heaven and Earth, so as to absorb and refine those tribulation powers.

"There are still four dark calendars in the world before the catastrophe is ushered in, it is not the best target, continue to search!"

Ye Tian gave up this copy body, let the copy body disintegrate on its own, and then set his sights on the second foreign force.

In this way, Ye Tian tried again and again, and finally found an exotic world that was very close to the Great Tribulation.

The force of this exotic world is called the Xiyue clan, and they also destroyed the gate, but it doesn't matter, Ye Tian already knows the coordinates of this exotic world, and he is ready to build a gate to connect this exotic world, and it is a second-order gate.

He already has the method of building the second-order gate in his hands, and he is only ready to wait for the moment when the first darkness of the Dark Forbidden Domain has passed and the illusory gate appears, completely fix this illusory gate, modify the coordinates and establish the second-order gate to connect the exotic world.
